rules.title: Shell command injection via concatenation
rules.recommendation: Use subprocess.run() with a list of arguments instead of string concatenation.

rules.title: subprocess with shell=True
rules.recommendation: Avoid shell=True. Pass arguments as a list to subprocess.

rules.title: Dynamic eval() with concatenation
rules.recommendation: Avoid eval() with dynamic input. Use safer alternatives like ast.literal_eval().

rules.title: Dynamic exec() with concatenation
rules.recommendation: Avoid exec() with dynamic input. Consider using importlib or other safe alternatives.

rules.title: Unsafe pickle deserialization
rules.recommendation: Do not unpickle untrusted data. Use JSON or other safe serialization formats.

rules.title: Hardcoded API key or secret
rules.recommendation: Move secrets to environment variables or a secrets manager.

rules.title: Hardcoded password
rules.recommendation: Never hardcode passwords. Use environment variables or a vault service.

rules.title: Hardcoded token or secret
rules.recommendation: Tokens and secrets should be stored in environment variables.

rules.title: GitHub PAT in code
rules.recommendation: Remove the GitHub token immediately and rotate it on GitHub.

rules.title: AWS access key in code
rules.recommendation: Remove AWS access key. Use IAM roles or environment variables.

rules.title: File opened without context manager
rules.recommendation: Use 'with open() as f:' context manager to ensure proper cleanup.

rules.title: Database cursor not closed
rules.recommendation: Always close cursors, preferably with a context manager.

rules.title: Database connection not closed
rules.recommendation: Use connection pooling or ensure connections are properly closed.

rules.title: time.sleep() blocks async event loop
rules.recommendation: Use 'await asyncio.sleep()' instead of 'time.sleep()' in async code.

rules.title: New function without corresponding test
rules.recommendation: Consider adding unit tests for this new function.

rules.title: Dynamic import with string concatenation
rules.recommendation: Dynamic imports with string concatenation are dangerous. Use importlib with validated module names.
